description_long: This is a triangular sandwich made with two slices of grilled bread, featuring visible grill marks on the top surface. The filling includes layers of leafy green lettuce, thinly sliced pink deli meat, and a slice of red tomato, all neatly stacked between the bread slices. The bread appears to be lightly toasted, giving it a slightly crisp texture, while the interior ingredients look fresh and colorful. The sandwich is cut diagonally, exposing the cross-section of its contents along the longest edge. There is no visible packaging or branding on the sandwich. The overall appearance suggests a freshly made, ready-to-eat sandwich suitable for casual urban dining.
description: A triangular grilled sandwich with visible layers of lettuce, deli meat, and tomato between toasted bread slices. The sandwich is fresh, colorful, and unwrapped.
description_view_0: The sandwich is shown from the side, highlighting the diagonal cut and the layered fillings of lettuce, deli meat, and tomato.
description_view_1: This view shows the opposite side, with the sandwich's fillings still visible but slightly less pronounced than in view 0.
description_view_2: The sandwich is seen from the back edge, emphasizing the grilled bread surface and a hint of the green lettuce and red tomato peeking out.
description_view_3: A rear view of the sandwich, mostly showing the grilled bread and a small portion of the fillings at the edge.
